appendDecision.signature: appendDecision(cwd: string, entry: { category: string, decision: string, rationale: string, source: 'user'|'agent', milestone?: string }): void

appendCorrection.signature: appendCorrection(cwd: string, entry: { original: string, correction: string, reason: string, affectedSets?: string[] }): void

queryDecisions.signature: queryDecisions(cwd: string, filters?: { category?: string, milestone?: string, limit?: number }): DecisionEntry[]
queryDecisions.description: Query decision log with optional filters, returns most recent first

queryCorrections.signature: queryCorrections(cwd: string, filters?: { affectedSet?: string, limit?: number }): CorrectionEntry[]
queryCorrections.description: Query correction log with optional filters

buildMemoryContext.signature: buildMemoryContext(cwd: string, setName: string, tokenBudget?: number): string
buildMemoryContext.description: Build a token-budgeted memory context section for injection into agent prompts

memoryCliCommands.signature: rapid-tools memory log-decision | memory log-correction | memory query [--category <c>] [--limit <n>]
memoryCliCommands.description: CLI commands for memory operations exposed through rapid-tools.cjs

appendOnly.description: JSONL files are append-only; entries are never modified or deleted after write

tokenBudgeted.description: buildMemoryContext output must not exceed the provided tokenBudget (default: 8000 tokens)

lazyInit.description: .planning/memory/ directory is created on first write, never eagerly
